Plating, Deflection Mk II.name: Plating, Deflection Mk II
Plating, Deflection Mk II.description: Vous améliorez davantage le blindage de votre vaisseau, lui accordant un DR total de 4, mais lui accordant un désavantage lors des tests de Dextérité (Cacher).

Ship Slicer, Mk I.name: Ship Slicer, Mk I
Ship Slicer, Mk I.description:
As an action, a crew member may choose a Small or smaller ship you can see. La cible must make an Intelligence (DD = 8 + prof. bonus + ship's charisma modificateur) jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it is disabled jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. Each time the ship takes dégâts or is la cible of a hostile power or ability while disabled in this way, it can repeat this jet de sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Cette aptitude can be used un nombre de fois égal à your ship's tier (a minimum of once). All expended uses are regained when the ship recharges.

Fire-Linked Primer.name: Fire-Linked Primer
Fire-Linked Primer.description: When you make a bonus attack with a weapon equipped to this mounting, you can add the ship's dégâts modificateur to the jet de dégâts of the bonus attack as long as it doesn't already include that modificateur.

Adaptive Ailerons.name: Adaptive Ailerons
Adaptive Ailerons.description: While you are in atmosphere, this modification reduces your turn speed by 100 mètres (min. 50 mètres) and grants you a +1 bonus to AC and Dexterity jet de sauvegardes.

EMP Device.name: EMP Device
EMP Device.description:
This modification adds a reusable EMP device to disable nearby electronics. As an action, a crewmember can activate the device. Each ship, within 100 mètres must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + the crewmember's bonus de maîtrise + the ship's Strength modificateur). On a failed sauvegarde, a ship is étourdi pendant 1 minute. As an action on each of the ship's turns, a crewmember can have the ship repeat the jet de sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success. You ship automatically fails the initial jet de sauvegarde, but has avantage on subsequent jet de sauvegardes against this effect.

Cette aptitude can be used un nombre de fois égal à your ship's tier (a minimum of once). All expended uses are regained when the ship recharges.

Comms Suppressor, Mk II.name: Comms Suppressor, Mk II
Comms Suppressor, Mk II.description:
This modification improves the communications suppressor. Your ship can now attempt to suppress the communications of a single target on a planet, a space station, or a starship within 1,000 mètres of your ship or the communications of a space station or starship within 1 mile.

De plus, your ship is expertly equipped for Charisma (Interfere) checks.

Ship Slicer, Mk II.name: Ship Slicer, Mk II
Ship Slicer, Mk II.description:
As an action, a crew member may upload a computer virus that stalls a ship. Roll 7d6; if the ship's remaining hull points are less than the total, the ship is stalled for one minute or until the ship takes dégâts,.

Cette aptitude can be used un nombre de fois égal à your ship's tier (a minimum of once). All expended uses are regained when the ship recharges.

Tuned Engines.name: Tuned Engines
Tuned Engines.description: Vous réglez la puissance de votre moteur pour permettre à un membre d'équipage de réaliser l'action Boost Engines comme bonus d'action à son tour.

Interrogation Chamber.name: Interrogation Chamber
Interrogation Chamber.description: Cette suite comprend tous les outils et appareils nécessaires pour interroger, voire torturer, un nombre de prisonniers égal à la moitié de la capacité de la suite du navire en termes de taille, comme indiqué dans le tableau de capacité de la suite de taille du vaisseau. Lorsqu'il interroge un prisonnier, l'interrogateur a un avantage sur les tests de Charisme (Intimidation) et de Charisme (Persuasion). S'ils passent au moins une heure à interroger un prisonnier, celui-ci est désavantagé aux tests de Charisme (Tromperie).

Electromagnetic Scrambler, Mk III.name: Electromagnetic Scrambler, Mk III
Electromagnetic Scrambler, Mk III.description:
You choose one ship you can see within 1200 mètres and scramble its ability to differentiate targets. La cible must make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + prof. bonus + ship's charisma modificateur). If the ship is directly piloted by a humanoid that is not incapacitated, it gains a bonus to the jet de sauvegarde equal to the pilot's Intelligence modificateur. On a failed sauvegarde, la cible loses the ability to distinguish friend from foe, regarding all ships it can see as enemies until the power ends. Each time la cible takes dégâts, it can repeat the jet de sauvegarde, ending the effect on itpersonnelle on a success.

Whenever the affected ship chooses another target, it must choose la cible at random from among the ships it can see within range of the attack, power, or other ability it's using.

Cette aptitude can be used un nombre de fois égal à your ship's tier (a minimum of once). All expended uses are regained when the ship recharges.

Recreation.name: Recreation
Recreation.description:
This suite comes with a number of recreational areas equal up to one-fourth the ship's suite capacity by size (minimum of one), as shown in the Starship Size Suite Capacity table. Recreational areas are equipped with integrated artist's implements, gaming sets, musical instruments, and writer's implements.

While making a check with any of these tools in a recreational area, you can add your bonus de maîtrise to checks you make if you do not already do so. If you already add your bonus de maîtrise to checks you make, you instead add double your bonus de maîtrise. If you already double your bonus de maîtrise to checks you make, you instead add half of your governing modificateur de caractéristique (rounded down, minimum of +1), in addition to your modificateur de caractéristique.

De plus, while utilizing any of these tools, you gain a benefit based on which tools you are using:

  • Gaming set or musical instrument: While playing one of the gaming sets or musical instruments, you can always readily read the emotions of those paying attention to you. During this time, and for up to one minute after completing, you have avantage on Wisdom (Insight) checks to read the emotions of those you performed for or competed against.

  • Artist's implements or writer's implements: While crafting with these implements, the total market value you can craft per day increases by an amount of credits equal to 5 x your character niveau. If you add double your bonus de maîtrise to checks you make with them, the market value increases by 10 x your character niveau.

Lastly, when a creature completes a repos long involving this suite, they gain avantage on the first test de caractéristique they make before the start of their next repos long.

Electronic Baffle.name: Electronic Baffle
Electronic Baffle.description:
When your ship would become ionized, shocked, or étourdi, a crewmember can use their réaction to roll one hull die and suffer dégâts to the hull equal to the amount rolled in order to ignore the triggering condition.

Cette aptitude can be used un nombre de fois égal à your ship's tier (a minimum of once). All expended uses are regained when the ship undergoes refitting.

Remote Override, Mk V.name: Remote Override, Mk V
Remote Override, Mk V.description: Cette modification permet au vaisseau dans lequel il est installé d'être contrôlé à distance depuis n'importe où dans la galaxie connue par un contrôleur correctement équipé.

Junk Disposal.name: Junk Disposal
Junk Disposal.description:
As an action, a crewmember may jettison a clump of refuse or junk that expands into a 50-foot-radius sphere centered on a point within 100 mètres. Each ship in that area must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + the crewmembers's bonus de maîtrise + the ship's Constitution modificateur). On a failed sauvegarde, a ship takes 1d6 kinetic dégâts and is shocked until the end of it's next turn.

The junk field's area of effect becomes difficult terrain for one minute or until cleared.

Cette aptitude can be used un nombre de fois égal à your ship's tier (a minimum of once). All expended uses are regained when the ship recharges.

Absorptive Shielding.name: Absorptive Shielding
Absorptive Shielding.description: You add an absorbtive capacitor to your shield generator, granting your shields resistance to kinetic dégâts.

Combat Thrusters, Mk IV.name: Combat Thrusters, Mk IV
Combat Thrusters, Mk IV.description: Your ship's turning speed decreases by 50 mètres.

Gravity Slice.name: Gravity Slice
Gravity Slice.description:
As an action, a crewmember can release a circular gravitic burst. Each ship within 200 mètres must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + ship tier + the ship's Strength modificateur). On a failed sauvegarde, a ship takes 8d6 true dégâts and, if the ship is the same size or smaller, is pushed back 50 mètres. On a successful sauvegarde, a ship takes half dégâts and isn't pushed.

All objects one size category smaller than the ship or smaller are also pushed 50 mètres back.

Cette aptitude can be used un nombre de fois égal à your ship's tier (a minimum of once). All expended uses are regained when the ship recharges.

Storage Compartment.name: Storage Compartment
Storage Compartment.description: Cette suite augmente la capacité de chargement de votre vaisseau de sa capacité de chargement de base, comme indiqué dans le tableau Capacité de chargement de la taille du vaisseau à la page 79. Le coût de base de la catégorie de modification de cette suite est de seulement 500 cr.

Piloting Chamber.name: Piloting Chamber
Piloting Chamber.description: Une chambre suffisamment grande pour un seul membre d'équipage est intégrée au navire.

Carbonite Launcher, Mk IV.name: Carbonite Launcher, Mk IV
Carbonite Launcher, Mk IV.description:
As an action, your ship can create a cloud of icy fog in a 200-foot-radius sphere centered on a point within 1200 mètres. The sphere extends around objects, and its area is heavily obscured. The fog is semi-solid, and its area is considered difficult terrain. Each ship that enters the area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there takes 4d6 cold dégâts and gains 1 slowed niveau until the end of its turn. The fog lasts for one minute or until it's dispersed.

Cette aptitude can be used un nombre de fois égal à your ship's tier (a minimum of once). All expended uses are regained when the ship recharges.

Sublight Drive, Mk V.name: Sublight Drive, Mk V
Sublight Drive, Mk V.description: Your ship's flying speed increases by 50 mètres.

Combat Thrusters, Mk III.name: Combat Thrusters, Mk III
Combat Thrusters, Mk III.description: Your ship's turning speed decreases by 50 mètres.

Sensor Array, Mk II.name: Sensor Array, Mk II
Sensor Array, Mk II.description: Vous améliorez encore le réseau de capteurs de votre vaisseau. Le score de Sagesse de votre vaisseau augmente de 1. Comme d'habitude, vous ne pouvez pas augmenter le score de Sagesse de votre vaisseau au-dessus du maximum correspondant à votre taille avec ce système.

Escape Pods, Hyperspace Capable.name: Escape Pods, Hyperspace Capable
Escape Pods, Hyperspace Capable.description:
Cette suite ajoute des capsules d'évasion à votre vaisseau. Chaque capsule de sauvetage est équipée d'un hyperdrive de classe 15, de 5 unités de carburant, ainsi que de rations et de fournitures d'urgence pouvant accueillir quatre membres d'équipage pendant 5 jours, dans des climats chauds et froids, comme décrit dans le chapitre 5 du Dungeon Master's Guide. La quantité de modules d'évacuation est égale à un quart de la capacité de la suite du navire, comme indiqué dans le tableau de capacité des suites de tailles de vaisseaux spatiaux.

Toutes les modules d'évacuation épuisés sont remplacés lorsque le navire subit un réaménagement.

Tributary Beam.name: Tributary Beam
Tributary Beam.description: This modification can be taken un nombre de fois égal à a ship's Constitution modificateur. This modification upgrades the Super-Heavy Turbolaser Battery, Capital Railgun, or Superweapon on your starship. The weapon deals an additional die of dégâts of the type used by the weapon.

Thrusters, Mk III.name: Thrusters, Mk III
Thrusters, Mk III.description: Vous améliorez considérablement les propulseurs de votre vaisseau. Le score de Dextérité de votre vaisseau augmente de 1. Comme d'habitude, vous ne pouvez pas augmenter le score de Dextérité de votre vaisseau au-dessus du maximum correspondant à votre taille avec ce système.

Pinpointing Addition, Mk I.name: Pinpointing Addition, Mk I
Pinpointing Addition, Mk I.description: Les portées de l'arme choisie de votre choix augmentent de moitié.

Shocking Rounds.name: Shocking Rounds
Shocking Rounds.description:
When you score a critical hit with the chosen weapon; when you have avantage on the attack roll and hit, and the lower of the two d20 rolls would also hit; when la cible ship rolls a 1 on the jet de sauvegarde to avoid the weapon's effects; or when la cible ship has disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde and fails, and the higher of the two rolls would also fail, you can force la cible to make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + the ship's Strength modificateur). On a failed sauvegarde, the ship is shocked jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour.

If the dégâtsd ship is larger than your ship, it has avantage on the jet de sauvegarde. If the dégâtsd ship is smaller than your ship, it instead has disavantage.

SLAM, Advanced.name: SLAM, Advanced
SLAM, Advanced.description:
Your ship's SubLight Acceleration Motor (SLAM) has been enhanced, granting more utility. When a pilot takes the Fly action, the increase now equals twice your speed, after applying any modificateurs. With a speed of 300 mètres, for example, your ship can move up to 900 mètres on its turn if you Fly. Any increase or decrease to your speed changes this additional Movement by the same amount. If your ship's speed of 300 mètres is reduced to 150 mètres, for instance, your ship can move up to 450 mètres this turn if you Fly.

This action still affects your entire ship: any skill check or attack roll made by your ship or anyone on it has disavantage.

Cette aptitude can be used un nombre de fois égal à your ship's tier (a minimum of once). All expended uses are regained when the ship recharges.

Electrical Dischargers.name: Electrical Dischargers
Electrical Dischargers.description:
As an action a crewmember may cause your ship to emit a burst of electricity. Each ship within 150 mètres, other than you, must succeed on a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + prof. bonus + ship's strength modificateur) or take 1d6 lightning dégâts.

This power's dégâts increases by 1d6 for every tier your ship is above first tier: 2nd tier (2d6), 3rd tier (3d6), 4th tier (4d6), and 5th tier (5d6).

Cette aptitude can be used un nombre de fois égal à your ship's tier (a minimum of once). All expended uses are regained when the ship recharges.

Damage Control System.name: Système de contrôle des dommages
Damage Control System.description:
You install a dégâts control system on your ship. A crew member can take the Patch action as a action bonus. Cette aptitude can be used un nombre de fois égal à your ship's tier (a minimum of once). All expended uses are regained when the ship undergoes refitting.

De plus, your ship is proficiently equipped for Constitution (Patch) checks.

Combat Thrusters, Makeshift.name: Combat Thrusters, Makeshift
Combat Thrusters, Makeshift.description: Your ship's turning speed decreases by 50 mètres and flying speed decreases by 50 mètres.

Droid Brain, Mk II.name: Droid Brain, Mk II
Droid Brain, Mk II.description: You further improve your ship's droid brain. Your droid brain's bonus de maîtrise increases to 3. De plus, your ship's droid brain has avantage on initiative rolls.

Central Computer, Mk V.name: Central Computer, Mk V
Central Computer, Mk V.description: You ship's central computer has reached its maximum potential. Your artificial intelligence's bonus de maîtrise increases to 6. De plus, it gains expertise in Piloting.

External Docking System.name: External Docking System
External Docking System.description:
Your ship is equipped with an airlock and couplers designed to attach and connect to one ship of a size one category smaller than your ship. As an action, a crew member can engage or disengage the external docking system. While a ship is coupled to your ship, the ships can share primary systems as appropriate, and creatures can transfer between ships readily. If at least one external docking system is occupied by at least one ship, your ship's flying speed decreases by 50 mètres (to a minimum of 50 mètres), its turning speed increases by 50 mètres, and its hyperdrive is considered one class greater (to a maximum of Class 20) for determining travel time in hyperspace.

Alternatively, this suite can accommodate multiple ships of smaller size. A Huge ship takes up the space of 10 Large ships, which in turn takes up the place of 10 Medium ships. One Medium ship takes up the space of five Small ships, which in turn takes up the space of two Tiny ships. You can also replace a ship with a droid or construct of four size categories larger.

Plating, Lightweight Mk III.name: Plating, Lightweight Mk III
Plating, Lightweight Mk III.description: You substantially upgrade your ship's armor plating, adding 50 mètres to your speed.

Reactor, Mk III.name: Reactor, Mk III
Reactor, Mk III.description: Vous améliorez considérablement le réacteur de votre vaisseau. Le score de Force de votre vaisseau augmente de 1. Comme d'habitude, vous ne pouvez pas augmenter le score de Force de votre vaisseau au-dessus du maximum correspondant à votre taille avec ce système.

Droid Brain, Mk V.name: Droid Brain, Mk V
Droid Brain, Mk V.description: Your ship's droid brain has reached its maximum potential. Your droid brain's bonus de maîtrise increases to 6. De plus, it gains a rank in a Deployment de votre choix.

Carbonite Launcher, Mk II.name: Carbonite Launcher, Mk II
Carbonite Launcher, Mk II.description:
As an action, a crew member may cause an explosion of cold energy to erupt from a point it chooses within 900 mètres. Each ship in a 50-foot-radius sphere centered on that point must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + prof. bonus + ship's wisdom modificateur). On a failed sauvegarde, a ship takes 3d6 cold dégâts, and gains 1 slowed niveau jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. On a successful sauvegarde, a ship takes half as much dégâts and isn't slowed.

Cette aptitude can be used un nombre de fois égal à your ship's tier (a minimum of once). All expended uses are regained when the ship recharges.

Weapon Slave Array, Mk II.name: Réseau d'esclaves d'armes, Mk II
Weapon Slave Array, Mk II.description: A l'équipier à la barre, lorsqu'il effectue l'action Tir avec une arme équipée à ce point d'emport, ne subit plus de désavantage.

Cryogenic Capacitor, Mk II.name: Cryogenic Capacitor, Mk II
Cryogenic Capacitor, Mk II.description: Vous améliorez les cellules de réserve de puissance de votre vaisseau. Votre vaisseau est parfaitement équipé pour les contrôles de Force (Boost).

Ejection Pod.name: Ejection Pod
Ejection Pod.description:
You integrate an ejection pod in your ship's cockpit. When your ship is reduced to 0 hull points but not destroyed outright, you can use your réaction to eject the pod from the ship.

The pod includes emergency rations and supplies that can support a number of creatures equal to your maximum crew capacity for 1 day, in both hot and cold climates, as described in chapter 5 of the Dungeon Master's Guide. The pod is Tiny size and has a flying speed of 150 mètres, a turning speed of 50 mètres, an AC of 10, and 5 hull points. The pod includes one unit of fuel.

Warhead Launcher.name: Warhead Launcher
Warhead Launcher.description:
As an action, a crewmember may generate a nuclear explosion in a 400-foot-radius sphere centered on a point within 1500 mètres. Every ship in that sphere must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + ship tier + the ship's Constitution modificateur). On a failed sauvegarde, a target takes 40d6 fire dégâts and is shocked until the end of it's next turn from an electromagnetic pulse. On a success, a ship takes half dégâts and is not shocked.

The explosion spreads around corners. It ignites flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

Cette aptitude can be used once before a ship is refitted.

The Starship Size Modification Cost for this modification is Large, regardless of the size of ship it is installed on.

Frame, Mk IV.name: Frame, Mk IV
Frame, Mk IV.description: Vous améliorez massivement la structure de votre vaisseau. Le score de Constitution de votre vaisseau augmente de 1. Comme d'habitude, vous ne pouvez pas augmenter le score de Constitution de votre vaisseau au-dessus du maximum correspondant à votre taille avec ce système.

Central Computer, Mk IV.name: Central Computer, Mk IV
Central Computer, Mk IV.description: You massively improve your ship's central computer. Your artificial intelligence's bonus de maîtrise increases to 5. De plus, when your artificial intelligence takes the Interfere action, it has avantage on the Intelligence (Interfere) check.

Plating, Lightweight Mk I.name: Plating, Lightweight Mk I
Plating, Lightweight Mk I.description:
Vous améliorez le blindage de votre vaisseau, ce qui lui confère un bonus de +1 à AC.

.

Hydroponics Garden.name: Hydroponics Garden
Hydroponics Garden.description:
Cette suite cultive des plantes pour la consommation ou le commerce.

Si le jardin est configuré pour la consommation, il produit chaque jour de la nourriture commune en quantité capable de subvenir aux besoins d'un nombre de civils, de membres d'équipage ou de soldats égal à un huitième de la capacité de la suite du navire, comme indiqué dans le tableau de capacité de la suite de taille de vaisseau.

Si le jardin est configuré pour commerce, à la fin de chaque mois (7 semaines de 5 jours), il produit des biens végétaux d'une valeur marchande en crédits égale à 10 fois la capacité de la suite du navire, comme indiqué dans le tableau Capacité de la suite de taille du vaisseau. Dans certains cas, un MJ peut déterminer que cette valeur pourrait être augmentée si une plante particulièrement rare est produite. Dans de tels cas, les joueurs peuvent avoir besoin de se procurer du matériel de démarrage rare, tel que des graines ou des boutures, pour démarrer ou poursuivre la production.

Plating, Reinforced Mk II.name: Plating, Reinforced Mk II
Plating, Reinforced Mk II.description: Vous améliorez davantage le blindage de votre vaisseau, lui accordant ainsi un DR total de 8.

Pressor Beam Generator.name: Pressor Beam Generator
Pressor Beam Generator.description:
As an action, a crew member can choose one ship or object within 600 mètres that is two or more size categories smaller than your ship and in an arc of a tractor beam of the ship. The ship or object is pushed 600 mètres in a direction de votre choix. If the ship or object collides with any une cible during its travel, both the ship or object and la cible take 3d8 kinetic dégâts. If la cible is a ship, it must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + ship tier + the ship's Strength modificateur). On a failed sauvegarde, it takes 3d8 kinetic dégâts, or half as much on a successful one.

Cette aptitude shares uses with the ship's Tractor Beam, and grants an additional such use.

Vault.name: Vault
Vault.description: Cette suite est équipée d'un coffre-fort, qui a une capacité égale à la moitié de la capacité de chargement de base de votre navire, comme indiqué dans le tableau Capacité de chargement de la taille du vaisseau à la page 79. Le coffre-fort est équipé à la fois d'une clé et d'un verrou à code, et est scellé magnétiquement pour empêcher son ouverture en cas de panne de courant. Le coffre-fort est accessible avec une vérification DD 25 Intelligence (Kit de sécurité). Lors de l'accès au coffre-fort, une alarme retentit dans Bridge and Security Suite (si elle existe). Si un joueur obtient un résultat de 30 ou plus au test d'Intelligence (Kit de sécurité) pour déverrouiller le coffre-fort, ou s'il possède la clé ou le code, l'alarme peut être contournée.

Plating, Reinforced Mk III.name: Plating, Reinforced Mk III
Plating, Reinforced Mk III.description: Vous améliorez considérablement le blindage de votre vaisseau, ce qui fait que les coups critiques effectués lors des jets d'attaque contre vous sont traités comme des coups normaux.

Emergency Generator.name: Emergency Generator
Emergency Generator.description:
Your ship is equipped with an emergency generator to recharge shields. When your ship is reduced to 0 shield points but not destroyed outright, a crewmember can use their réaction to have it drop to 1 shield point instead. Alternatively, if the ship has 0 shield points, a crewmember can use their action to restore shield points equal to twice the ship's strength modificateur.

Once either feature has been used, the emergency generator can't be used again until the ship recharges.

Tuned Weapons.name: Tuned Weapons
Tuned Weapons.description: Vous réglez la puissance de votre arme pour permettre à un membre d'équipage d'effectuer l'action Boost Weapons comme bonus d'action à son tour.

Reactor, Mk II.name: Reactor, Mk II
Reactor, Mk II.description: Vous améliorez encore le réacteur de votre vaisseau. Le score de Force de votre vaisseau augmente de 1. Comme d'habitude, vous ne pouvez pas augmenter le score de Force de votre vaisseau au-dessus du maximum correspondant à votre taille avec ce système.

Boarding Harpoon.name: Boarding Harpoon
Boarding Harpoon.description:
Your ship has been further modified with a massive grappling harpoon, through which creatures can pass. Your ship is expertly equipped for Strength (Ram) checks.

De plus, when a crewmember takes the Ram action, on a success, the ships become harpooned. While harpooned, your ship and la cible ship are slowed as show in the Harpooned and Harpooning Ship tables, below. A crewmember can release the harpooned ship at any time (no action required). The harpooned ship is automatically released if your ship becomes disabled, or if it is forcefully moved more than 100 mètres away from your ship.
